_doc_Ce: External (Dirichlet) concentration at r=R [mol/m3]. Use 0.0 for MMS.
_doc_k: First-order reaction constant [1/s]. Da = k*R^2/D_eff should be in [0.1, 10].
_doc_N_r: Number of radial grid points including both boundaries. Also the starting (coarsest) grid for spatial convergence sweeps.
_doc_N_t: Number of time steps including t=0. Also the starting (coarsest) grid for temporal convergence sweeps.
_doc_t_max: Simulation end time [s]. Use 4e9 for physical, 1.0 for MMS.
_doc_mms: If true, adds the MMS source term S_mms to the RHS at each time step. Required for convergence studies.
_doc_mms_solution: SymPy expression for C(r,t). Available symbols: r, t, R, D_eff, k, Ce. Must satisfy dC/dr=0 at r=0 and C(R,t)=0. Only used when mms=true.
_doc_run_convergence: Set to true to run spatial and temporal convergence studies. Requires mms=true.
_doc_N_r_conv: Fixed number of radial points during temporal convergence study. Must be large enough that spatial error does not pollute temporal error.
_doc_N_t_conv: Fixed number of time steps during spatial convergence study. Must be large enough that temporal error does not pollute spatial error.
_doc_num_refinements: Number of grid doublings in each convergence study. 4 refinements from N_r=11 gives grids up to N_r=81.
_doc_run_name: Label for this run. Results saved to results/{run_name}/ and data/{run_name}/. Use descriptive names for parameter sweeps, e.g. 'D0.1-k0.005'.
